## Type of Change

<!-- Mark the relevant option with an 'x' -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Test improvement
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Security fix

## Checklist

<!-- All items must be checked before merging -->

- [ ] My code follows the project's code style (`go fmt`, `go vet`)
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass (`go test ./...`)
- [ ] I have updated GoDoc comments for any changed exported symbols
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG.md (if applicable)
- [ ] My changes generate no new lint warnings (`golangci-lint run`)
- [ ] All new source files include the Apache 2.0 license header
- [ ] I have signed off my commits per the DCO (`git commit -s`)

## Security Considerations

<!-- If this change affects the security model, describe how -->

- [ ] This change does not affect the security model
- [ ] This change has been reviewed for security implications (describe below)
